query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ads) as total_ads, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ads WHERE status = 'approved') as approved_ads, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns) as total_campaigns, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evaluations) as total_evaluations;
